changes: Dev note - Step 1 (build): Stood up the loader from scratch - KeyAuth sign-in/registration, a black/purple Dear ImGui + DirectX 9 UI with open/close fades and toast notifications, manifest-driven version/patch-notes/announcements, and download-and-launch with a live progress bar.
Dev note - Step 2 (polish): Removed the panel scrollbars so every card shows all of its info at once, and moved the window onto the fast hardware present path for snappier, lower-latency UI.
Dev note - Step 3 (admins): Started the owner/admin role system and an in-loader Admin tab so the team can manage announcements, patch notes, and the download link without ever touching the config.

announcements.title: Loader is now in development mode
announcements.body: LurkedTweaks Loader has officially entered development mode. The devs are actively working to get everything up and running as soon as possible - thanks for your patience while we build it out. Watch this space for updates.
